name: Mekidulu 8782 | The "Galaxy View" 73" Multi-Capsule Wood Cat Empire
features: 🚀 Triple Space Capsule Experience: Featuring 3 high-clarity acrylic pods that provide a 'weightless' 360-degree panoramic view for multiple cats.
🏗️ 7 Levels of Vertical Mastery: A majestic 73-inch tall empire with a staggered layout that encourages active climbing and healthy joint mobility.
💎 Modern Furniture Aesthetic: Replaces dated carpet towers with a sleek, moisture-resistant wood finish that complements mid-century and minimalist home decor.
🛡️ Rock-Solid Stability: Engineered with a widened heavy-duty base and precision joints to absorb the shock of high-energy leaps and sprints.
🛋️ Total Furniture Protection: Integrated with multiple premium natural sisal-wrapped pillars to redirect scratching instincts and save your sofas.
✨ Hygienic & Anti-Microbial: The hair-free wood surfaces prevent dander buildup and odors; simply wipe clean in seconds for a pristine home.
🏰 Private Luxury Condo: Includes a secluded, spacious wooden hideaway for uninterrupted naps and a sense of security.
🐾 Universal Accessibility: Intentionally designed platform spacing ensures that both high-energy kittens and senior cats can navigate all 7 tiers safely.
📈 Extreme Cost-Performance: A masterpiece of 'China's Power Supply Chain,' delivering elite architectural design at an unbeatable factory-direct price.
